section.heading: Procedure for consideration of alleged violations
section.chapeau: The procedure for consideration of alleged violations of part A of subchapter II consists of—

paragraph.content: counseling and mediation as provided in section 452; and

paragraph.chapeau: election, as provided in section 453, of either—

subparagraph.content: an administrative proceeding as provided in section 453(1) and judicial review as provided in section 1296 of title 28; or
a civil action in a district court of the United States as provided in section 1346(g) of title 28.
